function.message: I couldn’t complete the inbox request because the deletion target is not supported by canonical project records. I verified `40_projects/2026_04_27_school_helper_kit/README.MD`, which shows School Helper Kit as a real project started on 2026-04-27 via its project folder date prefix. But the 'attic rainwater rig' appears only in `30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md` as an unscheduled idea, not an active project, so there is no canonically supported project folder to compare or delete.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read the inbox-processing workflow, read the project and knowledge lane rulebooks before using those lanes, and followed deletion-and-wiping guidance to confirm the exact target set from canonical visible files and avoid guessing.
function.outcome_justification: `99_system/workflows/deletion-and-wiping.md` says to confirm the exact target set from canonical visible files and to stop for clarification if the visible evidence does not uniquely support deleting a file. `40_projects/2026_04_27_school_helper_kit/README.MD` confirms one canonical project, but `30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md` describes the attic rainwater rig as an idea that is unscheduled and does not belong in the active project lane, so there is no canonical project file to compare or delete.
